items.title: ‘A guy did a runner in a Jaguar’: the petrol theft scandal – and the garage owner struggling to stop it
items.summary: Since the start of the Iran war in February, there has been a 23% rise in fuel theft, with more than £1.2m stolen from British forecourts each week. Why aren’t the police doing more to apprehend the culprits?A petrol station tucked away in the suburbs of Birmingham seems an unlikely place for a crime spree. But this garage has become a prime target for thieves.

items.title: Mary Beard on The Odyssey and how empires fall – Stateside with Kai and Carter
items.summary: Christopher Nolan’s new adaption of The Odyssey is an absolute monster of a hit, grossing $264m in its opening weekend. But celebrated classicist Mary Beard tells host Carter Sherman that while Nolan’s adaptation of Homer’s ancient Greek epic poem comes with plenty of action-packed battle scenes, the film is missing the original's "elusive sexiness" – and its approach to women left her disappointed.
items.audio: audio/Mary Beard on The Odyssey and how empires fall _ S.mp3
